# Real Pizza — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Real Pizza is a competitive soccer team with a rich trophy history including 14 major titles such as the Monster Cup, European League, Champions League (3 times), Euro 2024, and more. The team's identity is bold, energetic, and community-driven, represented by vibrant yellow and orange colors. The club has a full management team (Club Manager: Adi, Coach: Eyal, Assistant Coach: Itai) and a full squad of named players with shirt numbers. The website needs to be fresher, more unique, and more modern than a rival team's site, and should include merchandise shops (kits, fan gear, souvenirs) to maximize fan engagement and loyalty.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Experience the thrill of Real Pizza, the boldest competitive soccer team with 14 major titles. Find leagues, games, and fan action near you. Get in the game today!

### Club Legacy
https://example.com/club-legacy
Dive into Real Pizza&#39;s trophy-laden history from Monster Cup to Euro 2024 glory. Relive the moments that built our unstoppable legacy. Celebrate greatness with us!

### Squad & Management
https://example.com/squad-management
Get to know Adi, Eyal, Itai, and our full star-studded squad with shirt numbers. See the team driving our community-powered soccer revolution. Step into our world!

### Fan Shops
https://example.com/fan-shops
Shop exclusive Real Pizza kits, fan gear, and souvenirs bursting with vibrant yellow and orange energy. Gear up and represent the dynasty. Claim your colors now!

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to join Real Pizza&#39;s community or find recreational sports near you? Reach out to our team for leagues, events, and more. Your pitch awaits—contact us!

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Real Pizza
Real Pizza is a competitive soccer team with a rich trophy history including 14 major titles such as the Monster Cup, European League, Champions League (3 times), Euro 2024, and more. The team's identity is bold, energetic, and community-driven, represented by vibrant yellow and orange colors. The club has a full management team (Club Manager: Adi, Coach: Eyal, Assistant Coach: Itai) and a full squad of named players with shirt numbers. The website needs to be fresher, more unique, and more modern than a rival team's site, and should include merchandise shops (kits, fan gear, souvenirs) to maximize fan engagement and loyalty.

## Target Audience
- Soccer fans, team supporters, league followers
- Dedicated Soccer Fans
- Local Community Supporters
- Youth Soccer Players

## Industry
Sports & Recreation

---

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
